2605.00354.title: VQ-SAD: Vector Quantized Structure Aware Diffusion For Molecule Generation
2605.00354.paper_summary: Many diffusion based molecule generation methods ignore the symbolic information of molecules and represent the atom and bond type as one hot representation. Methods based on Morgan fingerprints produce hash collisions and are hard to embed into a continuous space without information loss and random fingerprints correspond to no valid molecule. To circumvent this issue we use another paradigm and consider atom and bond codes as latent variables of VQ-VAE. We introduce VQ-SAD which first trains a VQ-VAE and uses the frozen pretrained VQ-VAE model and considers the codebooks for both atom and bond types as tokenizers for the downstream diffusion process. VQ-SAD is a neuro-symbolic model that utilizes both symbolic and neural structural information for a diffusion based model with learnable forward process. The large discrete code space provides a more balanced atom and bond types which enhances the denoising process. VQ-VAE slightly outperforms SOTA models for diffusion based molecule generation on QM9 and ZINC250k datasets.
2605.00354.paper_summary_zh: 許多基於擴散的分子生成方法忽略了分子的符號信息，並將原子和鍵類型表示為獨熱編碼。基於摩根指紋的方法會產生哈希碰撞，並且難以在不丟失信息的情況下嵌入到連續空間中，而隨機指紋則對應於無效的分子。為了繞過這個問題，我們使用另一種範式，將原子和鍵編碼視為VQ-VAE的潛在變量。我們引入了VQ-SAD，它首先訓練一個VQ-VAE，並使用凍結的預訓練VQ-VAE模型，並將原子和鍵類型的碼本視為下游擴散過程的標記器。VQ-SAD是一個神經符號模型，利用符號和神經結構信息，為具有可學習前向過程的基於擴散的模型提供支持。大型離散碼空間提供了更平衡的原子和鍵類型，從而增強了去噪過程。在QM9和ZINC250k數據集上，VQ-VAE在基於擴散的分子生成方面稍微超越了SOTA模型。
2605.00354.author: Farshad Noravesh et.al.
2605.00354.authors: Farshad Noravesh, Reza Haffari, Layki Soon, Arghya Pal
